adminPage.noteFour: Sofuthwe lesifana naso ngu-ProPresenter. Sibita $399 kulayisensi yesiteshi lisinye. Ngente umcabango wekutsi libandla lelijwayelekile lifaka lesofuthwe emakhompyutheni lamatsatfu, ngase ngihlukanisa inani lelipheleleko lekufakwa ngu-3 kute ngitfole inani lemabandla. Ngiphindze ngenta nemcabango wekutsi emabandla atawukhuphukela kuphrograma lensha njalo eminyakeni lesihlanu. Ngako-ke $399 wehlukaniswa ngeminyaka lesihlanu wehlukaniswa ngemakhompyutha lamatsatfu = $26.60 lithemba ngemnyaka ngekhompyutha ngayinye. Nangabe singabala lesibonelo ngalokugcwele, kufanele sibuyeke lelinani.
adminPage.noteOne: Sofuthwe lesifana naso ngu-Breeze. Bakhokhisa $72 ngenyanga nome $864 ngemnyaka.
adminPage.noteThree: Kucuketfwe lokufanako ngu-Orange. Bakhokhisa $1023 ngemnyaka emabandla lanebabukeli labangu-26-50 kwe-252 Basic.
adminPage.noteTwo: Sofuthwe lesifana naso ngu-SubSplash. Baccala nga-$99 ngenyanga nome $1200 ngemnyaka. Loku akufaki incenye lebayitsatsako eminikelweni.
